apps.name: Research Board
apps.description: Organize research with notes, images, videos, YouTube links, and documents on a visual board. Features categories, search, and detail views.

apps.name: Kanban Board
apps.description: Local single-user Kanban board with drag-and-drop, labels, priorities, checklists, and due dates (no auth)

apps.name: Kanban Online
apps.description: Multi-user online Kanban board with sign-up/login auth, drag-and-drop, labels, priorities, checklists, and due dates

apps.name: Ledgerflow
apps.description: Comprehensive bookkeeping app for personal and business use with income/expense tracking, invoicing, bills, contacts, and financial reports.

apps.name: Luolinglo
apps.description: Language learning app with vocabulary, flashcards, quizzes, AI teacher, and heavy gamification.

apps.name: Trading View
apps.description: TradingView-like trading dashboard with interactive charts, technical indicators, and customizable widget layout.

apps.name: CRM System
apps.description: Attio-class multi-user CRM: People, Companies, and Deals as linked records with custom attributes, saved table/kanban views with inline editing, drag-and-drop pipelines edited on the board, 3-panel record pages with activity timelines, tasks + My Work, Cmd+K palette, SMTP email, funnel/win-rate/velocity reports, and on-demand AI via CraftBot's LLM.

apps.name: Creator Command Center
apps.description: Multi-platform dashboard for content creators. Pulls real data from YouTube, Discord, Twitter, and Notion via CraftBot integrations. See your subscribers, videos, community, and content pipeline in one place.

apps.name: CraftBot Tamagotchi
apps.description: A virtual CraftBot pet. Feed, play with, clean, and care for your own little CraftBot as it evolves from egg to adult.

apps.name: Habit Tracker
apps.description: Compact, customizable habit tracker with streaks, GitHub-style heatmap, and per-habit analytics. Track binary, count, duration, and avoidance habits in a Notion-monochrome layout.

apps.name: Word Improve
apps.description: GitHub-style merge UI for prose. Paste text, get LLM variants per paragraph or sentence, pick what you like, and copy the compiled improvement. Uses CraftBot's configured LLM provider.

apps.name: PDF Splitter
apps.description: Upload a PDF, preview pages, then split by selected pages, custom ranges, or every N pages. Download files individually or as a ZIP. Per-document split history, drag-and-drop upload, fully offline (PyMuPDF on the backend).

apps.name: Newsletter Tool
apps.description: Production newsletter platform like Loops or Beehiiv: subscribers with tags, drag-and-drop email builder, AI-generated copy via CraftBot's LLM, pre-built templates, scheduled sends through Gmail, plus open/click analytics and one-click unsubscribe.

apps.name: Craft Sheets
apps.description: A small Excel-style spreadsheet with a live formula engine (=SUM, =AVERAGE, cell & range refs), named sheets via bottom tabs, typed columns, cell formatting, and CSV/Excel import & export.

apps.name: Markdown Editor
apps.description: Three-panel markdown workspace: file browser, tabbed raw editor, and live GFM preview. Full file CRUD, resizable collapsible panels, and VSCode-style tabs.

apps.name: Image Utility
apps.description: Upload an image, crop it interactively, resize, compress, or convert to PNG/JPEG/WEBP, then download the edited file. All processing runs offline on the backend with Pillow.

apps.name: Brainstorm Graph
apps.description: Agentic brainstorming tool: give a topic and CraftBot spawns a growing graph of questions, answers, and ideas. Two views: Obsidian-style graph canvas and tree outline. CraftBot drives exploration autonomously.

apps.name: Social Media Manager
apps.description: Compose, schedule, publish, and analyze posts across Twitter/X, LinkedIn, and YouTube — with an AI writing suite built in.
